Workflow

How RaktaBridge Works

From inventory update to life-saving connection in 4 simple steps.

1

Live Update

Blood banks and hospitals update inventory levels instantly via dashboard or API integration.

Input Source

2

Instant Search

Doctors search for specific blood types/components. Results appear in real-time with location data.

Discovery

3

Emergency Alert

If stock is unavailable, an SOS broadcast is sent to all nearby facilities and network nodes.

Coordination

4

Donor Action

Registered donors receive targeted notifications based on location and blood type compatibility.

Resolution

Average cycle time reduced from 45 mins to 5 mins

Hospital

Network

Public
